Anyone else fell into the trap when they were younger?  About this book series being in the little kid section?  XD  12 year old me had to reread the part in Chapter one where Drew took a fire poker to the Rat's face :D  I had to reread it like 10 times, to make sure I read right.  The next time I went to the bookstore, I went up to the help desk and said, "Do you know the Wereworld book?  Rise of the Wolf?"  The worker said no.  So I brought them over to the kid section.  Grabbed one of the books and said,  "Amazing book.  Fantastic storytelling.  But it should be in the Young Adult or Adult section."  The worker of course didn't believe me, thinking I was too innocent or sensitive.  So i opened it up and read out ALL of the graphic parts to that worker XD  Their face went pale as they stared in horror at what I was reading.  She then grabbed all of the 'Rise of the Wolf' books off the shelf, thanked me, and hurried away.

Unfortunately though, it seems she was over ruled, because each time leading up to a new release or right after, it was back in the kid's section.  Next to the Ranger's Apprentice.

The thing that ANNOYS me the most?
Werewolves having a CLAW ATTACK! Wolves DO NOT attack with claws. They don’t have claws they are toenails. The toenails are used digging, scratching an itch, and most of all traction when running. The toenails allow wolves to change direction faster because the toenails dig into the ground for leverage. 
Go watch wolves hunting. They do not slash prey with their toenails. When wolves attack they *BITE* !!
Humans cannot cause life threatening slashing damage. At best it’s superficial scratches. 

Werewolves should not have a claw attack!
